testcase.classname: freezeCellModel marks a cell read-only and non-deletable
testcase.name: freezeCellModel marks a cell read-only and non-deletable

testcase.classname: thawCellModel removes the freeze metadata so the cell is editable again
testcase.name: thawCellModel removes the freeze metadata so the cell is editable again

testcase.classname: thawCellModel is a no-op for a cell that was never frozen
testcase.name: thawCellModel is a no-op for a cell that was never frozen

testcase.classname: isFrozen is true only when the cell is frozen
testcase.name: isFrozen is true only when the cell is frozen

testcase.classname: isFrozen is false when the cell is explicitly editable
testcase.name: isFrozen is false when the cell is explicitly editable

testcase.classname: moveDisplacesFrozenCell blocks moving the frozen cell itself
testcase.name: moveDisplacesFrozenCell blocks moving the frozen cell itself

testcase.classname: moveDisplacesFrozenCell blocks an editable move that crosses the frozen cell
testcase.name: moveDisplacesFrozenCell blocks an editable move that crosses the frozen cell

testcase.classname: moveDisplacesFrozenCell allows editable moves that do not cross the frozen cell
testcase.name: moveDisplacesFrozenCell allows editable moves that do not cross the frozen cell

testcase.classname: moveDisplacesFrozenCell allows any move when no cell is frozen
testcase.name: moveDisplacesFrozenCell allows any move when no cell is frozen

testcase.classname: globToRegExp treats `*` as within-segment (does not cross `/`)
testcase.name: globToRegExp treats `*` as within-segment (does not cross `/`)

testcase.classname: globToRegExp treats `**` as crossing `/`, including zero segments
testcase.name: globToRegExp treats `**` as crossing `/`, including zero segments

testcase.classname: globToRegExp matches a trailing `/**` against the directory itself and descendants
testcase.name: globToRegExp matches a trailing `/**` against the directory itself and descendants

testcase.classname: globToRegExp matches everything for a bare `**`
testcase.name: globToRegExp matches everything for a bare `**`

testcase.classname: globToRegExp treats `?` as a single non-`/` character
testcase.name: globToRegExp treats `?` as a single non-`/` character

testcase.classname: globToRegExp escapes regex metacharacters so they match literally
testcase.name: globToRegExp escapes regex metacharacters so they match literally

testcase.classname: globToRegExp anchors the whole path
testcase.name: globToRegExp anchors the whole path

testcase.classname: globToRegExp is case-sensitive
testcase.name: globToRegExp is case-sensitive

testcase.classname: pathMatchesAny returns false for an empty pattern list
testcase.name: pathMatchesAny returns false for an empty pattern list

testcase.classname: pathMatchesAny matches when any single pattern matches (OR semantics)
testcase.name: pathMatchesAny matches when any single pattern matches (OR semantics)

testcase.classname: pathMatchesAny matches when a later pattern matches after an earlier miss
testcase.name: pathMatchesAny matches when a later pattern matches after an earlier miss
